## Current Options Opportunities

**Best CSP:** PLTR $115 strike, 2026-07-17, 32 DTE, $2.54/$2.64 bid/ask, 0.22 delta, 25.7% annualized return

**Best LEAPS:** NFLX $25 strike, 2028-06-16, 732 DTE, $56.00/$61.00 bid/ask, 0.99 delta, 5.3% extrinsic (but trend shows "WAIT - AT LOWS")

**IVP Environment:** Mixed volatility landscape - PLTR (80% IVP) and NVDA (97% IVP) offering premium selling opportunities, while most names show elevated IV making LEAPS purchases expensive except NFLX at 7% IVP.
